# Xwork

> Xwork (thexwork.com) is a freelance marketplace that connects clients with skilled freelancers for design, development, writing, marketing and more. Clients post jobs for free and pay safely through escrow-protected milestones; freelancers find work, submit proposals, and get paid securely.

## Key facts
- Post a job: always free for clients.
- Payments: funds are held in escrow and released as milestones are approved.
- Service fee: 10% for freelancers on the standard plan, 5% on Pro; clients pay no service fee.
- Identity verification, reviews/ratings, and off-platform-payment protection are built in.

## Main pages
- [Home](https://thexwork.com/): overview of the marketplace.
- [Find work (jobs)](https://thexwork.com/jobs): browse and search open freelance jobs.
- [Find talent (freelancers)](https://thexwork.com/freelancers): browse and search freelancer profiles.
- [How it works](https://thexwork.com/hire): how hiring on Xwork works.
- [Pricing](https://thexwork.com/pricing): fees and plans.
- [Sign up](https://thexwork.com/register): create a client or freelancer account.
- [Log in](https://thexwork.com/login).

## Policies
- [Trust & Safety](https://thexwork.com/trust-safety)
- [Terms of Service](https://thexwork.com/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://thexwork.com/privacy)
